text.p: Owu City is known for wealth and protection because of its wall which was strongly built with the help of their fore -fathers Obatala.

The people offered sacrificies and pledges to the gods and in return, the gods will give them protection and riches. The events that led to the sack of owu was is that the law of the gods is that no Yoruba should take a Yoruba into slavery but the people of owu went to Apomu market harrassed the beautiful maiden's sexually and took some back to the city. Also the birth of Dejumo is prophesied that he would bring destruction to owu, he is to be killed but Erelu refused to kill him out of motherly love.
At last, the whole blame rested on Erelu for not allowing Dejumo to be killed.

Captain Bluntschli is a soldier who is suposed to carry ammunition but carrys chocolate. The writer used humor to convey his message. Also we see humor when Bluntschili who is inside his enemy enemies house instead of keeping alert sleeps off as Raina went to call her mother Catherine.

Bluntschili who was is disguised in petkoff's Coat runs away and after the war, he decides to bring (return) the coat. When Louka opened the door for him Catherine seeing Bluntschili wanted him to disappear without her husband knowing about his visit. There is humor also when Petkoff came out from the library and sees Bluntschili but that act made Catherine unconfortable.

The simplicity of the boy on the swing centers on his blue shirt and his short. It is believed that in south africa, the whites descriminate the black and all blacks are entitled to live in abject poverty. The blue shirt signifies how poverty has envoded over him. Also we see simplicity in the boy because instead of going to a hotel he decides to be on the swing. The Poem is decitful deceptive, it has a hidden idea outside the poem because it has alot to do with racial descrimination and apartied.

"Mother when will I wear long trousers" simply means that as old as he is he enjoys wearing shorts because of the type of job he is required to do. It will be of no use if he decides to wear long-trousers therefore he is seen as simple.
The atmosphere is filled with fear. The gods and the ancestors exercise great influence on the living. The people live to satisfy the intrest of the gods.

In our area of discussion, Pokuwa inability to become pregnant after two years of marriage is attributed to a wrong done of Tano the great ancestor. The gods has no power to open or close a womb this shows the restlessness of an old lady who is anxious to have a child. Therefore pokuwa is labelled barren.

Sometimes one commits an evil which affects the entire society. The god sends vengance by sending lightening and striking down trees. Peoples homes burnt down and most times death. But they did not know that what ever happened is as a result of nature.

Pokuwa and have in their helplessness visited Tano for a child but utterly rejects this influence because it sacrifies where too much. To satisfy this, refuses her purification rites of the supreme diety. She had Peace and eventually - conceives without the influence of the fetish - priest Tano.
The man represent Jesus christ the sea represent the problems and the boy represents the faithful servant.
